Hydrogen Fuel-Cell Race Strategy Lab

Burn-and-coast strategy exploration for a wheel hub motor prototype vehicle.

Scenario setup

Burn-and-coast controller

Start/finish editing is off. Choose a boundary button, then click a point on the track map.

Load a bundled track or upload a CSV with latitude, longitude, and optional elevation columns.

Fuel-cell power and energy exclude the horn, live telemetry system, and driver dashboard because those accessories are powered by a separate battery.

Key metrics

Interactive plots

Segment strategy summary

Segment Start (m) End (m) Mode Mean speed (km/h) Mean power (W) Grade (%) Curvature (1/m)

Designed for GitHub Pages and direct CSV uploads. Drop in a measured track file and the maps and strategy plots update automatically.
